info.title: innRoad.Integrations.Public.Api | v1
info.description:
This document describes the API endpoints available for the InnRoad Property Management System.

## Pre-requisites:
- Acquire API credentials (Oauth Client Id / Client Secret) from InnRoad team.
- Acquire user credentials (Client Code, Username, Password) for a Test InnRoad Property from InnRoad team.
- To access a Property's data via the Public API, that Property must first authorize the application.

## Steps to access the API:
- Use the ClientId / ClientSecret obtained from InnRoad team to obtain an access token using the Authentication section
- Once authenticated, access token will be automatically added to the request headers.
- Try any of the available endpoints to test the API.

get.summary: Endpoint to retrieve tenant access information.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Tenant identifier(Alpha-numeric and ULID format) that is received from innRoad team.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of room classes for a given tenant.

parameters.name: Statuses
parameters.description: Optional list of statuses to filter by. If omitted, all statuses are returned.

parameters.name: PageNumber
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 20.

get.summary: Retrieves a single room class by its identifier.

parameters.name: roomClassId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the room class. Retrieve available IDs from GET api/tenants/{tenantId}/room-classes.

post.summary: Retrieves folio details for a batch of reservations.
post.description: Accepts a list of reservation numbers and returns the associated folio items and transactions for each.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of reservations for a given tenant.

parameters.name: FilterType
parameters.description: Type of search filter to apply.

parameters.name: Statuses
parameters.description: Optional list of statuses to filter by. If omitted, all statuses are returned.

parameters.name: ArrivalDateFrom
parameters.description: Filter reservations with arrival date on or after this date (required if filterType=ArrivalDate).

parameters.name: ArrivalDateTo
parameters.description: Filter reservations with arrival  date on or before this date (required if filterType=ArrivalDate).

parameters.name: UpdatedDateFrom
parameters.description: Filter reservations updated on or after this datetime (required if filterType=UpdatedDate ).

parameters.name: UpdatedDateTo
parameters.description: Filter reservations updated on or before this datetime (required if filterType=UpdatedDate ).

parameters.name: PageNumber
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Default is 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Items per page. Default is 100, maximum is 1000.

get.summary: Retrieves a single reservation by its reservation number.

parameters.name: reservationNumber
parameters.description: Unique reservation number. Retrieve available numbers from GET api/tenants/{tenantId}/reservations.

patch.summary: Updates daily rates for a rate plan.
patch.description: Applies rate updates for one or more dates under the specified rate plan. Existing rates for the given dates are overwritten.

parameters.name: ratePlanId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the rate plan. Retrieve available IDs from GET api/tenants/{tenantId}/rate-plans.

get.summary: Retrieves daily rates for a rate plan within a date range.

parameters.name: ratePlanId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the rate plan. Retrieve available IDs from GET api/tenants/{tenantId}/rate-plans.

parameters.name: FromDate
parameters.description: Filter rates starting from this date, inclusive (yyyy-MM-dd). (Optional)

parameters.name: ToDate
parameters.description: Filter rates up to this date, inclusive (yyyy-MM-dd). (Optional)

parameters.name: PageNumber
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 20.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of rate plans for a given tenant.

parameters.name: Statuses
parameters.description: Optional list of statuses to filter by. If omitted, all statuses are returned.

parameters.name: PageNumber
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 20.

get.summary: Retrieves a single rate plan by its identifier.

parameters.name: ratePlanId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the rate plan. Retrieve available IDs from GET api/tenants/{tenantId}/rate-plans.

get.summary: Retrieves the property details for a given tenant.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Tenant Id (Alphanumeric). Retrieved from your authentication context.

get.summary: Retrieves availabilities for a room class within a date range.
get.description: Returns daily availability counts for the specified room class. Both StartDate and EndDate are inclusive. Date format: yyyy-MM-dd.

parameters.name: roomClassId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the room class. Retrieve available IDs from GET api/tenants/{tenantId}/room-classes.

parameters.name: StartDate
parameters.description: Start date of the availability range, inclusive (yyyy-MM-dd).

parameters.name: EndDate
parameters.description: End date of the availability range, inclusive (yyyy-MM-dd).

oneOf.description: The geographic location of the address. (Optional)

postalCode.description: The postal code or zip code. (Optional)

date.description: The date for this availability record (yyyy-MM-dd).

total.description: Total number of rooms for this room class.

available.description: Number of rooms available for booking.

outOfOrder.description: Number of rooms marked as out of order.

groupBlocked.description: Number of rooms blocked for group bookings.

date.description: The date this rate applies to (yyyy-MM-dd).

roomClassRates.description: List of room class rates for this date.

id.description: The numeric value of the enum.

name.description: The string name of the enum value.

id.description: The numeric value of the enum.

name.description: The string name of the enum value.

id.description: The numeric value of the enum.

name.description: The string name of the enum value.

id.description: The numeric value of the enum.

name.description: The string name of the enum value.

id.description: The numeric value of the enum.

name.description: The string name of the enum value.

id.description: Unique identifier of the folio item.

mainTransaction.description: The primary transaction for this folio item.

additionalTransactions.description: Additional transactions associated with this folio item.

ledgerAccountType.description: Ledger account type classification for this transaction.

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the transaction was created (UTC).

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate in decimal degrees.

reservationsFolios.description: List of reservations with their associated folios.

reservationNumbers.description: List of reservation numbers to retrieve folio details for.

items.description: The list of items for the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

total.description: Total number of items across all pages.

items.description: The list of items for the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

total.description: Total number of items across all pages.

items.description: The list of items for the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

total.description: Total number of items across all pages.

items.description: The list of items for the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

total.description: Total number of items across all pages.

ledgerAccountType.description: Ledger account type classification for this transaction.

quantity.description: Number of units for this transaction.

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the transaction was created (UTC).

id.description: The unique identifier of the property.

timezone.description: The time zone of the property. Timezone is in IANA format. Example: America/Los_Angeles

currencyCode.description: The currency code of the property. Example: USD

roomCounts.description: The number of rooms in the property.

lastUpdate.description: Last update DateTime of the property.

includedAdults.description: Number of adults included in the base rate. (Optional)

includedPersons.description: Number of persons included in the base rate. (Optional)

id.description: Unique identifier of the rate plan.

name.description: Display name of the rate plan.

isDerived.description: Indicates whether this rate plan is derived from another rate plan.

status.description: Current status of the rate plan.

oneOf.description: Stay restriction rules for this rate. (Optional)

folios.description: List of folios associated with this reservation. (Optional)

roomNumber.description: Room number assigned to the reservation.

roomClassId.description: Unique identifier of the assigned room class.

totalNights.description: Total number of nights for the stay.

adults.description: Number of adults in the reservation.

children.description: Number of children in the reservation.

isGroup.description: Indicates whether the reservation is part of a group account.

bookedOn.description: Date and time when the reservation was booked (UTC).

cancellationDate.description: Date the reservation was cancelled, if applicable. (Optional)

roomClassId.description: Unique identifier of the room class.

rate.description: Rate details for this room class.

id.description: Unique identifier of the room class.

name.description: Display name of the room class.

abbreviation.description: Short abbreviation code for the room class.

status.description: Current status of the room class.

description.description: Optional description of the room class.

address.description: Physical address of the property associated with this room class.

roomCounts.description: Room count breakdown for this room class.

totalRooms.description: Total number of rooms in this room class.

physicalRooms.description: The number of physical rooms in the property.

virtualRooms.description: The number of virtual rooms (Suite rooms) in the property.

totalRooms.description: The total number of rooms in the property (physical + virtual).

minNights.description: Minimum number of nights required for this rate. (Optional)

noCheckIn.description: If true, check-in is not permitted on this date. (Optional)

noCheckOut.description: If true, check-out is not permitted on this date. (Optional)

date.description: The date to apply rate updates for (yyyy-MM-dd).

roomClassRates.description: List of room class rates to update for this date.

updateDailyRateRequests.description: List of daily rate updates to apply.
